sections.description:
Exposes REST endpoints for the SEO Remediation Agent: RankMath title/meta updates, head/footer script injection (schema, analytics tags, etc.), and cache purge. No HFCM dependency required.

All snippets are stored in wp_options and output via wp_head/wp_footer hooks. Fully manageable via the REST API.
sections.installation:
1. Upload the plugin zip via Plugins → Add New → Upload.
  2. Activate the plugin.
  3. Create an Application Password for an Administrator user (Users → Profile → Application Passwords).
  4. Use the REST endpoints at /wp-json/rankmath-bridge/v1/ with HTTP Basic Auth.
sections.changelog:
1.2.1

  • Added /snippets/replace-all endpoint for atomic full-store rewrite
  • Fixes duplicate snippet cleanup issue

1.2.0 — April 2026

  • Removed HFCM dependency entirely — snippets now stored in wp_options
  • Added snippet create/update/delete/list endpoints
  • Added cache purge endpoint (LiteSpeed, SiteGround, WP Rocket, W3TC)
  • Added WordPress auto-update support via GitHub

1.1.0

  • Added HFCM bridge endpoints (deprecated)
  • Added cache purge endpoint

1.0.0

  • Initial release — RankMath title/meta/robots/focus keyword update + verify
